one_liner: AI-powered image and video generation platform with 30+ models (Kling, Veo, Flux, Sora) accessible via REST API, SDK, CLI, and MCP server.

auth_methods.notes: Primary method uses KEY_ID:KEY_SECRET credentials string, passed via HF_CREDENTIALS environment variable or config function. HTTP API uses Authorization: Key KEY_ID:KEY_SECRET header or Bearer token.
Used for MCP server integration—one-time OAuth handshake with Higgsfield account, no API keys required for MCP access.

self_serve_notes: API access is not available on the free tier. It requires upgrading to a paid professional or studio-level plan. The free plan only supports manual web-based experimentation, not programmatic API access.

api_surface.notes: Offers REST API with HTTP endpoints, official SDK for Node.js/TypeScript, and a CLI tool. Supports 30+ image and video generation models (Kling, Veo, Flux, Sora). API includes model invocation, project management, and character training capabilities.

main_blocker: API access requires a paid subscription; not available on the free tier.

evidence.supports: Official Node.js SDK exists with v2 API support, authentication via KEY_ID:KEY_SECRET credentials
Published NPM package @higgsfield/client v0.2.1 with TypeScript support for image and video generation
Official CLI tool available with 'higgsfield auth login' command for authentication
Hosted MCP server exists with OAuth authentication, supporting 30+ models
API access gated to paid plans; not available on free tier
MCP server integration documentation for Claude and other AI agents
